selection_rule.policy: For every major release line that publishes REST API files, track the latest patch of each of its newest 4 minor lines.

tracked.provenance: Converted from the official MiR REST API PDF: https://supportportal.mobile-industrial-robots.com/support-files/manuals/PDF/rest_api/MiR_MIR250_REST_API_3.8.1.pdf

notes: The portal (free account required; MIR_PORTAL_EMAIL/MIR_PORTAL_PASSWORD) publishes the API definitions as PDFs only. The scraper converts the preferred robot PDF (MIR250 first; FLEET/HOOK excluded) to Swagger 2.0; the converter is validated against the pinned official 3.5.4 swagger.json every scrape run.
